case_title: GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST vs. FRM CORPORATION DBA MANOR HOUSE et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRM CORPORATION DBA MANOR HOUSE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRM CORPORATION DBA MANOR HOUSE
SECOND MEMO SUBMITTED BY DEFT NO JURY DEMAND

DEPT, JUDGE J.ORR, CSR CARLITO MANDIA, CLERK E.MONTI COMPLT FILED: 11-01-93 10:50 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, BRIAN KRAM. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DAIVD CUNNINGHAM. BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT: JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF FOR IMMEDIATE REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 200 KANSAS ST. #19 STAYED TO 12-31-93. JUDGMENT IS FURTHER STAYED PENDING DELIVERY OF A $10,000 CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER & A SECURED NOTE & DEED OF TRUST BY 4PM, 12-10-93 TO PLTF COUNSEL. THE NOTE SHALL BE PAYABLE BY 1-31-94 AT AN INTEREST RATE OF 9%, TOTALING $12,908.93. IF DEFT FAILS TO DELIVER THE $10,000 & DEED OF TRUST BY 4PM, 12-10-93, WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY BE ISSUED EX PARTE. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY 12-31-93, PLTF MAY OBTAIN POSSESSION BY WRIT OF POSSESSION EX PARTE. CASE SUBMITTED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST ESTABLISHED UNDER THE WILL OF GIUSEPPE GIURLANI COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST ESTABLISHED UNDER THE WILL OF GIUSEPPE GIURLANI
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAUPHIN, ROBERT JOSEPH SUBSTITUTED FOR KRAM, BRIAN FOSTER AS ATTORNEY FOR GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST ESTABLISHED UNDER THE WILL OF GIUSEPPE GIURLANI
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,150.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST ESTABLISHED UNDER THE WILL OF GIUSEPPE GIURLANI

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANO GIURLANI TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST ESTABLISHED UNDER THE WILL OF GIUSEPPE GIURLANI AS TO DEFENDANT FRM CORPORATION DBA MANOR HOUSE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRM CORPORATION DBA MANOR HOUSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 200 KANSAS ST. #19, SF, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO PAY $10,000 CASHIERS CHECK BY 12-10-93, 4PM TO PLTF COUNSEL. DEFT TO DELIVER A SECURED NOTE & DEED OF TRUST TOTALING $12,908.92 (INCLUDES INTEREST RATE OF 9%) PAYABLE BY 1-31-94.
